package rulefixtures

import (
	"crypto/aes"
)

// scenario for ecb_mode_cipher: direct use of `cipher.Block.Encrypt` / `cipher.Block.Decrypt` without a block mode wrapper (CBC, CTR, GCM)
// fixture polarity: positive; family: security; severity: warning.
func scenario707Positive(key []byte, blockText []byte) error {
	block, err := aes.NewCipher(key)
	if err != nil { return err }
	block.Encrypt(blockText, blockText)
	return nil
}
